rulings.Case Title: DOUGLAS YEP VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, November 5, 2010, line 4, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER.
